About me

Projects

Hi, I’m Noa Aguilera, a graphic designer, photographer and illustrator. I began my path collaborating with creative agencies, design studios and brands, learning to build strong visual identities. Here you can check out some of my professional and personal projects: App design, motion graphics, packaging design, illustration and photography books, editorial design, branding projects and typography creation.
